source.author: Intergalactic Herald
source.classification_rationale: Weekly newsletter/recap aggregates developments and linked sources.

summary.neutral_abstract: Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week. We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic
summary.historical_value: Contemporary Intergalactic Herald publication preserved with role and attribution boundaries.
summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
We are creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
Star Atlas SAGE Labs Sneak Peak
The Hologram published an article about the upcoming Star Atlas SAGE Labs.
STAR ATLAS #192 Golden Tickets Explained By Another Creator LOL
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video of updates from Star Atlas.
Star Atlas Chatter #9 – Atlas Brew 74 FTW! & WTH is a SDU?
RahMega posted a video recapping the past week in Star Atlas news.
Metaverse Nomads #107 Star Atlas w/ RahMega
Metaverse Nomads posted a video replay of their Star Atlas live stream.
WEEKLY STAR ATLAS NEWSLETTER #92
Aephia published their latest Star Atlas newsletter.
SAGE LABS – A GUIDE
Aephia published a guide to Star Atlas SAGE Labs.
Star Atlas and MoonPay Join Forces to Lead Millions of Players into Web3 Gaming
Star Atlas published an article about adding MoonPay to Star Atlas.
STAR ATLAS – Prepare for SAGE Labs!!
Atlas Theory posted a video on preparing for SAGE Labs.
Star Atlas Announces First Ever Web3 Space Economy Simulation Game for Solana and P2E Gamers
Star Atlas posted an article announcing Star Atlas SAGE Labs.
The Atlas Brew #75
Star Atlas TV posted a video replay of the latest Atlas Brew.
Atlas Brew #75 – SAGE Labs Economics
The Hologram News Network posted a video replay of the latest Atlas Brew.
Star Atlas Recap August 16 2023
Beyond the Horizon posted a video recapping the latest Star Atlas updates.
Star Atlas – New Info, Images and Alpha from SAGE Labs!
Atlas Theory posted a video of more information about SAGE Labs.
Play Star Atlas : Showroom 2.1 with an Xbox Controller
PockThePirate posted a video about how to use a Xbox controller with Star Atlas.
